'''hafufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foaming|foaming]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foaming|foaming]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hafufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæfifith|hæfifith]] || [[word:hæfifij|hæfifij]] || [[word:hæfifish|hæfifish]] || [[word:hæfifi|hæfifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hafufufuth|hafufufuth]] || [[word:hafufufuj|hafufufuj]] || [[word:hafufufush|hafufufush]] || [[word:hafufufu|hafufufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hafufuth|hafufuth]] || [[word:hafufuj|hafufuj]] || [[word:hafufush|hafufush]] || [[word:hafufu|hafufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hafuffuth|hafuffuth]] || [[word:hafuffuj|hafuffuj]] || [[word:hafuffush|hafuffush]] || [[word:hafuffuf|hafuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hafufuthu|hafufuthu]] || [[word:hafufuju|hafufuju]] || [[word:hafufushu|hafufushu]] || [[word:hafufuku|hafufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hafufuth|hafufuth]] || [[word:hafufuj|hafufuj]] || [[word:hafufush|hafufush]] || [[word:hafufu|hafufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hafufuthul|hafufuthul]] || [[word:hafufujul|hafufujul]] || [[word:hafufushul|hafufushul]] || [[word:hafufukul|hafufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hafufuthuthu|hafufuthuthu]] || [[word:hafufujuju|hafufujuju]] || [[word:hafufushushu|hafufushushu]] || [[word:hafufuku|hafufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hafufuthun|hafufuthun]] || [[word:hafufujun|hafufujun]] || [[word:hafufushun|hafufushun]] || [[word:hafufukun|hafufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hafufuthuoro|hafufuthuoro]] || [[word:hafufujuoro|hafufujuoro]] || [[word:hafufushuoro|hafufushuoro]] || [[word:hafufukuoro|hafufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
